title: Jerry copies opponent primary base stats

card.rawText: This creature copies the base stats of your opponent's primary creature. This includes: AL, SPD, Atk Dice Rolls, Modifier, and Type. Switch stats if a new primary creature enters the field.

effect.value: Copy opponent primary base AL, SPD, Atk Dice Rolls, Modifier, and Type

plan.title: Jerry copies opponent primary base stats
plan.summary: Place Jerry across from the synthetic primary creature and verify Jerry's effective AL, SPD, Atk Dice Rolls, and Modifier copy the opponent primary's base stats.

notes: Set the opponent synthetic primary creature with base AL 3, SPD 10, Atk Dice Rolls 2, and Modifier 1.

steps: Set Jerry as player_1 primary creature.
Set the synthetic creature as player_2 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Jerry copies opponent primary base AL
Jerry copies opponent primary base SPD
Jerry copies opponent primary base attack dice
Jerry copies opponent primary base Modifier

manualVerification: Confirm Jerry recalculates when the opponent primary creature changes.
Confirm creature Type copying is represented once type-layer support exists.
riskNotes: This fixture covers copied numeric stats; creature Type is documented as a manual follow-up because effectiveStats currently exposes numeric combat stats.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Jerry's opponent-primary numeric stat copy.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
